---
title: "Stress, Strain & Material Behaviour"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
canvas:
  type: page
  published: true
---

This page tests callout blocks, syntax-highlighted code, LaTeX, and tables in a
single engineering page.

## Stress Tensor

In 3-D the state of stress at a point is the symmetric Cauchy stress tensor

$$
\boldsymbol{\sigma} =
\begin{bmatrix}
\sigma_{xx} & \tau_{xy} & \tau_{xz} \\
\tau_{xy} & \sigma_{yy} & \tau_{yz} \\
\tau_{xz} & \tau_{yz} & \sigma_{zz}
\end{bmatrix}.
$$

The principal stresses for plane stress follow from

$$
\sigma_{1,2} = \frac{\sigma_x + \sigma_y}{2}
\pm \sqrt{\left(\frac{\sigma_x - \sigma_y}{2}\right)^2 + \tau_{xy}^2}.
$$

## Callout Blocks

::: {.callout-note}
## Sign Convention
Tensile stress is positive; compressive stress is negative.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
## Stress Concentrations
Sharp notches raise local stress well above the nominal value $\sigma_{nom}$.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## Quick Check
For a circular shaft, polar moment $J = \tfrac{\pi d^4}{32}$.
:::

::: {.callout-important}
## Yielding
Compare the von Mises stress $\sigma_v$ against the yield strength $\sigma_y$.
:::

::: {.callout-caution}
## Buckling
Slender columns can fail by buckling **before** reaching $\sigma_y$.
:::

## Typical Material Properties

| Material | $E$ (GPa) | Yield $\sigma_y$ (MPa) | Density (kg/m³) |
|:---------|----------:|-----------------------:|----------------:|
| Structural steel | 200 | 250 | 7850 |
| Aluminium 6061-T6 | 69 | 276 | 2700 |
| Titanium Ti-6Al-4V | 114 | 880 | 4430 |

## Computing Axial Stress

```python
def axial_stress(force_n: float, area_mm2: float) -> float:
    """Return axial stress in MPa for a force in N and area in mm^2."""
    return force_n / area_mm2  # N/mm^2 == MPa


sigma = axial_stress(40_000, 200.0)
print(f"Stress = {sigma:.1f} MPa")
```

```javascript
// Convert a bending moment (N*m) and section modulus (m^3) to stress (Pa)
function bendingStress(moment, sectionModulus) {
    return moment / sectionModulus;
}
```

Inline code such as `sigma = F / A` should be preserved. Fenced blocks must not
have their contents treated as links or images:

```
![not an image](nope.png)
[not a link](nowhere.qmd)
```
